name: Deborah Ross
subject: Happy New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Happy New Year, Friend! I hope that you were able to spend time with your loved ones and friends during this holiday season. I made sure to spend my holiday reflecting on a remarkable 2016. Last year was one of the most rewarding years of my life. It was my pleasure to run for U.S. Senate and garner the support of millions of North Carolinians. We put thousands of miles on the campaign car, driving from Murphy to Manteo -- and even Nags Head. We visited community centers, schools, churches, coffee shops, and of course Bojangles for iced tea. But the best part about last year was meeting and talking with folks and having real, honest discussions about the direction of our state and country. Those conversations give me so much hope for the future. I know that North Carolina's best days are still ahead of us. In the new year, I am ready to renew my effort to stay in touch, listen to our people and work for positive change. And I'm counting on you to be there with me. We must hold our elected officials accountable to the people at all levels of government. Now more than ever we must stay engaged in our communities and our political discourse. This is just the start of our journey. Although I will not be your United States Senator, I will never stop standing up for you. I can't wait to see what we can accomplish together. Thank you! Deborah Ross |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42057/2cc31c44/46f565d/19f9f85e/1226173683/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.deborahross.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

---

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
After a year of great highs and lows, 2017 has arrived! This New Year will be one of challenges and tests. |
Friend,

After a year of great highs and lows, 2017 has arrived! This New Year will be one of challenges and tests.

Everyday I meet people who want to know what they can do in the weeks and months ahead to protect the progress we have made and push back against Trump policies that threaten to drag us backwards.

This moment in history calls for vigilance, engagement, and mobilization. Reach out to your neighbors and engage with people who may have a different political outlook. Join local, state and national organizations dedicated to the common good. And be prepared to mobilize and march to protect the promise of America -- equal rights, equal justice and equal opportunity.

There is important work we can do through an array of community, state and national organizations working to expand educational and economic opportunity, end homelessness, defend women's rights, support immigrants, protect our environment, advance social justice, fight racism and reduce violence. Getting more involved in civil society groups is one way to push back against those who want to turn back the clock in America.

In the Senate, I will be working hard with my new colleagues to defeat the destructive legislative initiatives that are already being drafted. As the new Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), I will also be working to re-elect the 25 Senators in our Democratic Caucus who are up for election in 2018 -- these seats represent the last Blue line of defense against the Trump agenda.

As they say -- trying times test what we are made of. I am confident that we are up to the task ahead.

On Tuesday, I will have the honor of taking the oath of office to serve you and the people of Maryland in the United States Senate. I am ready to get to work to defend our values, meet our challenges, and seize any opportunity to move our nation toward an ever more perfect union.
Thank you for your trust and support. Let's get to work together!

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b48/70cdc2ba/473a2995/3979ea3/1356740011/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em010117&source=em010117")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b48/70cdc2ba/473a2995/3979ea0/1356740011/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em010117&source=em010117") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tell Congress: Protect and expand health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In less than one week, the new Republican Congress will begin their efforts to dismantle America's health care system. Their goal is to take away health insurance from tens of millions of Americans, privatize Medicare, make massive cuts to Medicaid, increase prescription drug prices and defund Planned Parenthood. At the same time, in the midst of a grotesque and growing level of income and wealth inequality, they want obscene tax breaks for the top one-tenth of 1 percent.
As we enter the new year, our message to the Republicans is simple and straight forward. You are not going to get away with it. You are not going to punish the elderly, disabled veterans, the children, the sick and the poor while you reward your billionaire friends.
Stopping this Republican assault on the working class of this country will require the active participation of millions of Americans in every community in our country. In fact, it will require nothing less than a political revolution that engages millions of people from all walks of life, regardless of whether they voted for Hillary Clinton, Donald Trump or anyone else.
**OnSunday Jan. 15, Democratic members of Congress, trade unions, senior citizen groups, health care activists and all those who believe in economic and social justice are organizing a day of action called "Our First Stand: Save Health Care." Rallies will be held around the country. Now I need to know that you're in:**
[**Add your name to demand that Congress protect and expand the health care needs of working families, not cut them. Tell Trump and Congress that they must pass legislation that makes the wealthy start paying their fair share of taxes instead of trying to slash life-or-death programs that tens of millions of Americans rely on.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/our-first-stand?source=em170101-a "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/our-first-stand?source=em170101-a")
Change will never happen from inside of Washington, D.C. -- it will always come from our communities and the grassroots. That is what the history of America is all about. Whether it's the creation of the trade union movement, the women's movement, the civil right's movement, the environmental movement, the gay rights movement and more, justice prevails when we stand together. We lose when we are divided or apathetic.
**So Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer, House Democratic Leader Nancy Pelosi and I have asked my colleagues in Congress to organize events in their states and their districts where people can come together and make their voices heard. We will win when we are all in this fight together.**
With Donald Trump set to take office and Republicans in control of Congress, it's more important than ever that we recommit ourselves to building a movement that transforms this country and brings people together around an agenda that works for the working families of this country, and not just the 1 percent.
And Jan. 15 is a good day to begin that fight.
[**Please add your name to tell Congress that we will not accept horrific cuts to Medicare, Medicaid and Planned Parenthood and that we will not allow millions to lose their health insurance. Tell Trump and Congress to represent all Americans, and not just wealthy campaign donors.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/our-first-stand?source=em170101-a "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/our-first-stand?source=em170101-a")
There's not much time between now and Jan. 15. Add your name today, and help us build the resistance.
Within the next 10 days we will have more information as to when and where rallies in your state and community will be held.
Check back at berniesanders.com for rally listings and look for a follow up email with rally information. Let's go forward together.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/our-first-stand?source=em170101-a "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/our-first-stand?source=em170101-a")****
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
